Pinsk 8 0 2013 Bereza-2010 6 0 2013 Volna Pinsk 14 1 2014 Minsk-2 29 0 2022 2023 Zenit Międzybórz 12 0 Club domestic league appearances and goals Vadzim Mytnik Belarusian : Вадзім Мытнік ; Russian : Вадим Мытник ; born 5 July 1988 is a Belarusian former professional footballer . His father Ihar Mytnik played football professionally in the 1980s and 1990s.
